name: The Indian Hume Pipe Company Limited
summary: The Indian Hume Pipe Company Limited engages in the construction contract activities in India. It engages in manufacturing, laying, and jointing pipelines. The company undertakes water supply projects for the supply of drinking and irrigation water; and sewer and drainage pipelines for cities and towns, as well as designs, fabricates, and installs penstock pipes for hydroelectric projects, and cooling water pipelines for thermal power plants. It also offers prestressed concrete pipes, prestressed concrete cylinder pipes, bar wrapped steel cylinder pipes, steel pipes, reinforced cement concrete pipes, and penstock pipes; and prestressed concrete monoblock sleepers for Indian Railways. In addition, the company undertakes various other projects, such as tunnel lining; head works, including pumping machinery; treatment plants; overhead tanks; and other civil construction projects. Further, it is involved in the development of land. The company was founded in 1926 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India. The Indian Hume Pipe Company Limited is a subsidiary of IHP Finvest Ltd.
